Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring - Multi-service Docker deployment with nginx reverse proxy, Express.js API, and React frontend
Container.RunCmd:
# DNS Monitoring Unraid Deployment Script
set -e
APPDATA_PATH="/mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring"
echo "[1/5] Creating application directory..." mkdir -p "$APPDATA_PATH" cd "$APPDATA_PATH"
echo "[2/5] Cloning/updating repository..." if [ -d ".git" ]; then git -C "$APPDATA_PATH" pull --ff-only 2>/dev/null || true else git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git . 2>/dev/null || true fi
echo "[3/5] Creating data directory..." mkdir -p "$APPDATA_PATH/data" chmod 755 "$APPDATA_PATH/data"
echo "[4/5] Pulling and starting services from GHCR..." docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml pull docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml up -d
echo "[5/5] Waiting for services to start..." sleep 10
echo "" echo "=========================================" echo "DNS Monitoring Deployment Complete" echo "=========================================" docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml ps echo "" echo "Access the application at: http://[IP]:3000" echo "==========================================="
Container.RemoveCmd: set -e cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml down -v rm -rf /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring
Container.Description:
# DNS Monitoring - Multi-Service Docker Deployment
Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics dashboard with real-time monitoring capabilities.
## Architecture
This deployment uses Docker Compose to run three integrated services:
- **nginx** (Reverse Proxy) - Listens on port 3000, routes traffic to backend API and frontend UI - **backend** (Node.js/Express) - REST API for DNS monitoring, database operations, and query processing - **frontend** (React/Vite) - Web-based dashboard for viewing DNS queries and analytics
All services run on a private bridge network for secure inter-service communication.
## Installation Steps
1. Click "Apply" to add this container 2. The RunCmd will automatically: - Create /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring directory - Clone the GitHub repository - Pull pre-built Docker images from GHCR (ghcr.io/freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest) - Start all three services using docker-compose - Display service status
3. Wait 1-2 minutes for services to start (no build needed) 4. Access the web interface at: http://[IP]:3000
## Docker Image Source
**Image**: ghcr.io/freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest **Registry**: GitHub Container Registry (GHCR) **Auto-builds**: Enabled on GitHub Actions (every commit) **No credentials needed** for public GHCR image
## Features
- Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based responsive web dashboard - Express.js REST API backend - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Configurable DNS servers (default: 1.1.1.1) - Timezone support - Health checks on all services
## Data Storage
- **Database Location**: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/dns-monitoring.db - **Project Files**: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/ - **Docker Volumes**: - dns-data (SQLite database) - nginx-cache (nginx caching)
## Configuration
### Environment Variables
- `TZ`: Timezone (default: Asia/Singapore) - Set to your timezone - `DATA_PATH`: Database storage path (auto-configured)
### Network
- Internal bridge network: dns-monitoring - External port: 3000 (HTTP) - Internal ports: - backend: 3000 - frontend: 5173 - nginx: 80 (internal)
## Accessing the Application
- **Web UI**: http://[YOUR_UNRAID_IP]:3000 - **API Endpoint**: http://[YOUR_UNRAID_IP]:3000/api
## Troubleshooting
### Check Service Status ``` ssh root@[UNRAID_IP] cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml ps ```
### View Logs ``` docker logs dns-monitoring-backend docker logs dns-monitoring-frontend docker logs dns-monitoring-nginx ```
### Restart Services - In Unraid WebUI: Click "Stop" then "Start" - Or via SSH: ``` cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml restart ```
### Database Issues If experiencing SQLite errors: 1. Verify permissions: `ls -la /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/` 2. Check disk space: `df /mnt/user/appdata/` 3. Restart containers: Stop and Start in Unraid WebUI
### Network Issues If nginx can't reach backend: 1. Verify all services are running: `docker-compose ps` 2. Check bridge network: `docker network inspect dns-monitoring` 3. View nginx error logs: `docker logs dns-monitoring-nginx`
## Performance Notes
- First startup takes 1-2 minutes (images pulled from GHCR, no build needed) - Subsequent restarts are faster (30-60 seconds) - Initial database creation is automatic - Images are pre-built and cached in GHCR for faster deployment
## Updates
To update to the latest version from GHCR: 1. SSH into Unraid 2. Navigate to: `cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring` 3. Pull latest images: `docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml pull` 4. Restart: `docker-compose -f docker-compose.unraid.yml up -d` 5. Or simply restart the container in Unraid WebUI
## Support
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring - Issue Tracker: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring/issues - Discussions: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring/discussions
## Security Notes
- All services run as non-root users - No privileged container access required - Database stored on local encrypted Unraid disk - Network isolation via bridge network - CORS enabled for local network access

Config.Name: App Data Path
Config.Description: Path for application data and database

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for application (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Tokyo)
